case_title: JOSE ROCHA VS. BARR HOMES, INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROCHA, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT BARR HOMES, INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
